name: Spinach Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Pierce packages of spinach with a fork. Place on paper plate, microwave each at High for 2 minutes.
2. In a 2-cup glass bowl, combine butter and chopped onion. Microwave on High for 2 minutes.
3. In a blender jar, combine eggs, biscuit mix, half and half, basil, salt, nutmeg, and pepper. Process on low speed for 3 minutes.
4. Pour the mixture into a 10-inch quiche dish. Sprinkle shredded cheese over the cream mixture.
5. Combine onion and butter mixture with drained spinach. Add the spinach mixture to the cream and cheese mixture.
6. Garnish with paprika.
7. Microwave the quiche at Medium-High for 14 to 16 minutes, rotating the dish 1/4 turn at 3 1/2 to 4 minutes intervals.
8. The quiche is done when a knife comes out clean when inserted in the center.
9. Yields 8 to 10 servings.
